possible_dialog: I think we are ready for another experiment!
The disturbance has gotten really strong over the past few days, I think we should do another experiment.
I just finished processing the data from the last experiment, but we need more data so are you up to helping out with another experiment?
reject_dialog: Sorry, I'm still analyzing the data from the last experiment, come back later.
Can it wait? I'm running some other experiments right now.
I saw some men in black suits walking around the neighborhood. I think they're looking for me, so I've got to lay low for a couple of days.
I pulled an all nighter crunching data from experiments so can you come back later? I need to get some sleep...
unavailable_msg: The house appears to be abandoned, but there is a sign saying "FOR RENT" in the front yard.
first_dialog: Greetings! I saw you in my crystal ball the other day and I've been expecting you...

Oh, sorry, I forgot that saying that kind of freaks out those inexperienced with magic. By the way, I'm Willow. I just got out of university for the year but I'm currently... investigating something of high importance.

Okay, just between you and me, there has recently been an... imbalance in the natural magical field. It's causing a lot of weird things to happen, such as weeds becoming more agressive and shrub demons to prematurely migrate.
I think part of it is due to the construction of a new data center to the north along with a weedkiller factory to the west but there seems to be a much larger disturbance as well...
I've been trying to track down this disturbance over the past few weeks - it hasn't been easy. I think some powerful people are trying to stop me, that's why you have to keep this secret.
I've recently tracked down the main source of the magical field disturbance to this neighborhood. I started renting this house to continue my investigation here.
It also helps that some of my friends live nearby and my sister got a job at the nearby store so I can reach out to them for help if I need it. I still need to stay on the down low though.

Now, I still don't know a lot of things about the disturbance but I have figured out that it is slowly corrupting the life in in the lawns with an evil that could very well cause a collapse in the magical field...
Yes, as it would render everything within a 100 km radius around here uninhabitable for human life.
Now, this is where you come in. I still need to do some more research to track down the source of the disturbance but I have noticed that my backyard for this house seems especially exposed.

A lot of the data suggests that excessive lawn mowing and weedkiller usage is part of the problem but I also have some evidence that it might also be part of the solution. You've been mowing people's lawns a lot recently, right?
I need your help with some experiments - namely I just need you to mow my lawn while I collect some data. I can give you some magical spores and seeds as a bonus.
player_dialog: Should I be concerned about this collapse?
first_job_offer: I assume that you don't want the magical field around this neighborhood to collapse, so do we have a deal?
